prompt:
Create an image
I'm sharing a screenshot of my real X (Twitter) profile. Recreate this as a beautiful hand-drawn colored pencil doodle illustration on white paper — same layout, same username OzairAI, same follower counts, same pinned tweet content — but transform everything into cute doodle art style.
Style upgrades to add:
— Profile picture: redraw as a chibi anime-style character with same face.
— Banner: exactly same but drawn
— Scatter cute AI-themed doodle stickers around the phone frame: tiny robots, circuit hearts, lightning bolts, pixel stars, glowing chat bubbles
— Some stickers should break out of the phone border for a 3D pop-out illusion
— Bio and tweets: keep same text but render in cute handwritten font style
— Color palette: soft lavender, electric blue, warm gold, mint green
Vertical 9:13 format. Ultra photorealistic colored pencil texture, 8K, no extra text overlays, cinematic color grading.
